sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42216" key="e)rgopone/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐργο-πονέομαι</orth>, <sense id="n42216.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">work hard,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:3:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
